User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and API routes
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_nuxt/
Disallow: /server/

# Allow important pages
Allow: /
Allow: /fr
Allow: /demo
Allow: /playground

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://wineater.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1
